title: Assembly Layer
description: A single layer within an assembly system, defined by position, control-layer assignment, material reference, and attachment method.

position.description: Layer position from exterior to interior (1 = outermost).

control_layer_id.description: Control layer function this layer serves. References shared/control_layers.json.

material_ref.description: Reference to a material entry in Construction_Material_Kernel.

status.description: Current status of this layer record.

attachment_method.description: How this layer is attached to the substrate or adjacent layer.

thickness.description: Layer thickness with units (e.g., '3 inches', '60 mil', '1/2 inch').
